title: Remove duplicate pool/poolOptions block in apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts
description: apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts contains two pool declarations: line 28 (pool: 'forks') with a 7-line rationale comment block explaining why threads pool was rejected (workers hang 17+ min when tests leak DB/Redis/HTTP handles), and line 122 (pool: 'threads') with a throwaway 'Pool options for better performance' comment. In JavaScript object literals, the last key wins, so pool: 'threads' is what actually executes at test time — silently overriding the deliberate forks choice and exposing tests to the 17+ minute hang failure mode the rationale comment was explicitly designed to prevent. The second block was likely leftover from the Jest→Vitest migration documented at the top of the file (created 2025-12-24). Same for poolOptions: line 29 (forks-specific) is shadowed by line 123 (threads-specific). This deliverable removes the second pool/poolOptions block (lines 121-127 inclusive, plus the throwaway comment), preserving the intentional forks configuration. Surfaced by spike A-2 (spike/vitest-shared-alias-fix-2026-06-06) which observed test files executing twice under vitest.workspace.ts mode because both the forks pool and the threads pool ran the same test file — symptom of the duplicate key. Closes FU-EB-VITEST-API-GATEWAY-DUPLICATE-POOL-CLEANUP-1 (P2) clean.

outputs.description: Duplicate pool/poolOptions block removed from apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts.
acceptanceCriteria: File apps/api-gateway/vitest.config.ts contains exactly ONE pool: declaration after merge.
Remaining pool: declaration is the intentional 'forks' block (line 28 pre-merge, preserved with its 7-line rationale comment).
File contains exactly ONE poolOptions: declaration after merge (the forks-specific one).
Removed block is the 'Pool options for better performance' comment + pool: 'threads' + poolOptions: { threads: ... } closing — pre-merge lines 121-127 inclusive plus any adjacent whitespace.
No other lines in the file change.
